Designed for wine enthusiasts who appreciate both style and functionality, this high-quality wine glass enhances your drinking experience while offering a modern, sleek alternative to traditional glassware. Key Features: Durable Stainless Steel: Crafted from premium, food-grade stainless steel, this wine glass is built to last. It's resistant to breakage, ensuring long-term use and making it perfect for outdoor activities, picnics, and travel. Elegant & Modern Design: With its polished finish and contemporary silhouette, this wine glass exudes sophistication and is sure to impress at any gathering, from casual dinners to formal events. Temperature Control: The stainless steel material helps to maintain the perfect temperature for your wine, whether you’re enjoying a chilled white or a warm red, keeping your drink at its best for longer. Versatile Use: Ideal for red wine, white wine, cocktails, or even non-alcoholic beverages, this versatile glass works for a variety of drinks, making it a staple for any occasion. Easy to Clean: The non-porous surface of stainless steel resists staining, odors, and corrosion, making cleaning effortless. It’s also dishwasher-safe for added convenience. Eco-Friendly & Travel-Friendly: A great eco-conscious choice for those who prefer reusable drinkware. Perfect for outdoor events, camping, barbecues, and tailgating, it provides a stylish yet practical alternative to fragile glass wine glasses. The Stainless Steel Wine Glass combines beauty, strength, and performance in one sleek package. Whether you're hosting a gathering, enjoying a quiet evening, or sipping on the go, this wine glass is the perfect way to elevate your wine experience.

- [Flat Casual Boat Shoes with Bow Mary Jane Style](https://sehtsm-fg.myshopify.com/products/flat-casual-boat-shoes-with-bow-mary-jane-style): Discover the perfect blend of comfort and style with our new flat casual boat shoes, featuring a chic pointed design adorned with a bow that adds a touch of elegance to your everyday look. Crafted from high-quality fabric, these shoes are designed for a light, airy feel, making them the ideal choice for warm days or casual outings. The flat heel ensures that you stay comfortable while looking fashionable, allowing you to walk with ease all day long. Available in a variety of sizes from 35 to 40, you can find the perfect fit for your feet. Choose from a stunning palette of colors, including Royal Blue, Yellow, Rose Red, and more, ensuring you can express your personal style effortlessly. The shoes are designed with a sewing shoe craft technique, ensuring durability while maintaining a lightweight feel. The rubber sole provides excellent grip and traction, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor activities. Whether you're going for a casual stroll, meeting friends for brunch, or simply running errands, these Mary Jane flats are versatile enough to complement any outfit. Don't miss out on this stylish addition to your wardrobe! Explore our collection and find your perfect pair today.

Whether you're a beginner or an experienced fitness enthusiast, this sliding board offers smooth, controlled movements that help strengthen your core, improve flexibility, and boost overall stability.Key Features:✅ Smooth Sliding Motion – Designed for fluid, low-impact movement, reducing strain on joints while maximizing muscle engagement.✅ Full-Body Workout – Targets core, legs, arms, glutes, and back muscles, making it ideal for Pilates, resistance training, and rehabilitation exercises.✅ Compact & Space-Saving – Perfect for small spaces, this sliding board offers an effective home gym solution without taking up too much room.✅ Non-Slip Surface & Base – Ensures stability and safety during workouts, preventing unwanted movement or slipping.✅ Durable & High-Quality Material – Built with premium-grade materials, ensuring longevity and durability for long-term use.✅ Lightweight & Portable – Easy to store and transport, making it ideal for home use, travel, or gym sessions.✅ Low-Impact Exercise – Perfect for individuals looking for a gentle yet effective workout, ideal for injury recovery, weight loss, and strength training.Why Choose the Pilates Sliding Board?Designed to mimic the benefits of reformer Pilates, this sliding board helps you tone muscles, enhance flexibility, and improve posture from the comfort of your home. - [LED Infrared Belt Therapy Device](https://sehtsm-fg.myshopify.com/products/led-infrared-belt-therapy-device): Product Description:Experience soothing relief and enhanced wellness with the 105 LED Infrared Heating Red Belt Therapy Device. Designed for those who seek a natural way to ease muscle pain, promote blood circulation, and support overall relaxation, this innovative therapy device combines the healing power of infrared light and heat therapy. Equipped with 105 high-quality LED lights, the red belt provides deep tissue penetration, offering targeted relief to areas of discomfort. Whether you're dealing with chronic pain, stiffness, or simply want to relax after a long day, this device helps you feel rejuvenated with every use.Key Features: 105 LED Infrared Lights: Features 105 powerful LED lights that emit infrared red light, helping to penetrate deeply into the skin and tissues to relieve pain, improve circulation, and promote healing. Adjustable Heat Settings: Choose from multiple heat levels to customize the warmth and intensity according to your comfort needs, ideal for managing different types of pain and discomfort. Targeted Therapy: The red belt design targets specific areas such as the back, shoulders, waist, and neck, delivering concentrated therapy to your most problematic zones. Convenient and Comfortable Wear: Soft, flexible, and adjustable belt design allows for a secure and comfortable fit, ensuring it stays in place while you relax or go about your activities. Portable & Easy to Use: Lightweight and portable, it can be used at home, in the office, or even while traveling for on-the-go relief. Non-Invasive & -Free: Provides a safe, non-invasive alternative to medications or treatments, offering natural relief without side effects. Automatic Shut-off: Built-in timer function ensures the device automatically powers off after a set period, providing peace of mind during use. Wide Application: Suitable for muscle pain, joint stiffness, arthritis, stress relief, and general relaxation. Specifications: LED Count: 105 infrared LED lights. Infrared Wavelength: 660nm red light for deep tissue penetration and healing. Heat Settings: Adjustable heat levels (Low, Medium, High). Power Supply: USB rechargeable or AC adapter (depending on model). Timer Function: Auto shut-off after 30/60/90 minutes. Material: Soft, breathable fabric for comfort and durability. Dimensions: One size fits most with adjustable straps. Voltage: 5V DC (for USB models). Battery Capacity: Rechargeable battery (model-specific). Color Options: Black, Gray, or Beige. What's in the Box: 1 x 105 LED Infrared Heating Red Belt Therapy Device 1 x USB Charging Cable (if applicable) 1 x User Manual 1 x Adjustable Strap Size: 130 × 18 × ? cm

Crafted from high-quality Modal fabric with a touch of spandex, this T-shirt boasts a soft and breathable feel that moves with you, ensuring maximum comfort during workouts or casual outings. Available in a variety of colors including Light Grey, White, Royal Blue, and Black, you can easily find the perfect shade to match your personal style. With sizes ranging from S to L, you can enjoy the ideal fit that complements your figure. Just remember, if you're between sizes, it's best to opt for the larger size for the best fit. Don't miss out on adding this versatile piece to your wardrobe!

- [Boxing Target Machine](https://sehtsm-fg.myshopify.com/products/boxing-target-machine): Product Description: Boxing Target Bluetooth Music HomeTake your home workout to the next level with the Boxing Target Bluetooth Music Home—the perfect fusion of fitness and entertainment. Designed for both boxing enthusiasts and those looking to add some fun to their workout routine, this interactive target offers a dynamic training experience. Featuring Bluetooth connectivity, it allows you to play your favorite music or follow along with training apps while you punch. Whether you're training for speed, accuracy, or just want to blow off some steam, this boxing target provides real-time feedback and an engaging experience right in the comfort of your own home.Features: Interactive Boxing Target: The target reacts to your punches, providing real-time feedback to help you improve your technique and performance. Bluetooth Connectivity: Stream your favorite music or workout playlists directly from your phone, keeping you motivated during your session. Built-In Sound System: The integrated speakers offer high-quality sound for a complete audio-visual experience. Customizable Workouts: Choose from various training modes designed to improve speed, accuracy, and power. Suitable for beginners and advanced boxers. Durable & Safe Design: Made with high-quality materials to withstand powerful punches, while ensuring a safe and enjoyable workout. Compact & Space-Saving: Perfect for home use, the compact design allows for easy setup in any room without taking up too much space. LED Lights & Visual Feedback: The target features LED lights that light up upon impact, offering visual feedback to track your progress and motivation. Specifications: Material: High-quality, durable plastic and foam for shock absorption Connectivity: Bluetooth 4.0 (compatible with most smartphones and devices) Power Source: Rechargeable battery (USB charging) Weight: Approximately 2.5 kg (5.5 lbs) for easy portability Dimensions: 45 cm x 45 cm (17.7 x 17.7 inches) Sound System: 2 x 3W integrated speakers for clear audio LED Lights: RGB LED lights that light up with each punch impact Compatible Apps: Works with fitness apps and training programs for guided workouts Perfect For: Home fitness enthusiasts, boxing practitioners, or anyone looking for a fun and effective way to stay in shape while enjoying music. This Boxing Target Bluetooth Music Home combines fitness, entertainment, and technology in a compact package, making it the ideal addition to your home gym setup.

The size of our hip thrust belt is 46x8 cm / 17x3 in (total length 107cm / 42 in) which can be easily folded into the bag without occupying space and weight. - [Support pour Smartphone avec Stabilisateur Manuel Stafect InnovaGoods](https://sehtsm-fg.myshopify.com/products/support-pour-smartphone-avec-stabilisateur-manuel-stafect-innovagoods): Si vous aimez l'univers des gadgets, InnovaGoods vous propose les meilleures et les plus originales nouveautés en matière de maison, voitures, voyages, enfants, technologie, divertissements, etc.! Découvrez une vaste gamme de produits de qualité qui se démarquent de par leur fonctionnalité, leur efficacité et leur design innovant, comme Support pour Smartphone avec Stabilisateur Manuel Stafect InnovaGoods !Un support pour smartphone avec stabilisateur manuel qui vous permet de prendre des photos et des vidéos de haute qualité en stabilisant l’image, pour des résultats professionnels avec une résolution optimale. Sa conception réglable convient à la plupart des smartphones du marché, offrant un support stable, sûr et ferme. Ce support mobile multi-positions polyvalent est très versatile et adaptable car il peut être utilisé manuellement ou sur un trépied. Il comporte plusieurs trous et fentes pour une insertion facile sur un trépied (horizontalement ou verticalement) et pour l’insertion d’autres accessoires (non inclus) qui contribuent à améliorer le résultat final, comme un spot, un micro, etc. Pour une utilisation manuelle, il est doté de deux poignées latérales confortables pour une prise en main et une utilisation faciles avec une ou deux mains, il est ainsi possible de le placer dans la position souhaitée à tout moment, avec une liberté de mouvement totale. Il est également léger, portable et facile à transporter et à ranger.
